narrative:
Jackson Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 912 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.8 percentage points.
